name: part_003
file: tmp_【Sneak Peak】hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE Chromatic Future【#holoIDChromaticFuture 】 [GvDwA90OOuU]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_003.webm

scenes.description: Kobo, Kaela, and Zeta talk about the first song and their excitement being on stage.
Zeta introduces the concert title "Chromatic Future" and Kaela explains its meaning of creating colorful memories.
Zeta encourages fans to post on social media using the official hashtag to show their passion.
The members discuss the surprise of having a 9-member concert in Indonesia and its significance.
Kaela looks forward to the future and jokingly suggests world domination as the next goal.
Kobo expresses gratitude to the fans and sponsors for making the live concert possible.
Kaela highlights their new 3D models, leading to Kobo playfully monopolizing the camera.
Zeta wraps up the MC segment, jokingly telling the others not to fight over the camera.
